title: Hiring Financial Analyst at State Bank of India Digital Technologies
company: State Bank of India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Hiring Financial Analyst at State Bank of India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
State Bank of India Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Jodhpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About State Bank of India Digital Technologies:
State Bank of India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India Digital Technologies!
